releases.name: Local-Media-Embedder v0.1.2

releases.author: seyf1elislam
releases.description:
**Local-Media-Embedder v0.1.0**  
*Initial Release*

We’re excited to introduce the first release of the **Local-Media-Embedder** plugin for Obsidian! This plugin enables you to embed media files—such as videos, images, and audio—directly into your notes from any location on your device, without the need to copy the files into your vault. It helps keep your vaults streamlined and lightweight while providing full access to your local media files.

### Key Features:

- Seamlessly embed local **images, videos, and audio** files into your notes.
- Avoid duplicating files by referencing media from any directory on your device.
- Supports a wide range of media formats, including **JPG, PNG, MP4, MP3**, and more.
- Enhance your notes with rich multimedia content without increasing the size of your vault.

This plugin is ideal for users looking to keep their vaults efficient while still integrating high-quality media directly into their Obsidian workflow.
releases.name: Local-Media-Embedder v0.1.0
